since_last: 67% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.93%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.47% · BTC +2.41% · Gold +1.11% · Nasdaq100 +1.11%. 67% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.93%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.93%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.94%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CBRS is the standout at +9.26%
cards.body: Leaders: CBRS +9.26%, TER +9.19%, SKHY +7.54%, MU +6.44%, AMAT +6.25%. Laggards: OKTA -3.28%, WDAY -3.25%, CRWD -2.74%, S -2.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.94% at $126.96
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.94% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
